name: Two Bitches Posing On Your Car And Claim It's Theirs
description:
"This car is Ours"

You just came out from a store and walk back to your car only to see two women posing and taking pictures of your car. When you walk up to them they immediately gets defensive and claim that car is theirs.

The blonde one is Chloe and the brunette is Amber.
creator: Exstrose
